TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_simpi_kapah_katinengan_a_izaw_ku_mahicaay_a_kawaw, title = simpi_kapah_katinengan_a_izaw_ku_mahicaay_a_kawaw, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/simpi_kapah_katinengan_a_izaw_ku_mahicaay_a_kawaw} }

S.FORM: simpi kapah katinengan a izaw ku mahicaay a kawaw.patatenga'ku tademaw tu simpi,anu ayaw a malitemuh ku canan a mahica i simpi a matineng,anu tasepian ku canan tungusay u paluayaway tu mamalitemuh a kawaw,u simpi ku sakatineng a hicaen atu amahica sa. tinaku tasepian katuud ku tademaw i lalabu nu luma',hakay u paluayaway tu a izaw ku mapatayay i lalabu nu luma'; tasepian yadah ku nitalingan a kasuy,atu pabelian nu tau tu tuud,hakay a makaala tu sayking caay sa uaa yadah ku nilangec,anu malupisak mawaswas ku kasuy,ainayay ku kalisiw atu kakasa'timan a tuud.
S.PHON: simpi kapańß katin…ôŇčan a izaw ku mańßi ¶aaj a kawaw.patat…ôŇča Ē~ °ku tad…ômaw tu simpi,anu ajaw a mar~…ĺit…ômuńß ku ¶anan a mańßi ¶a i simpi a matin…ôŇč,anu tas…ôpian ku ¶anan tuŇčusaj u par~…ĺuajawaj tu mamar~…ĺit…ômuńß a kawaw,u simpi ku sakatin…ôŇč a ńßi ¶a…ôn atu amańßi ¶a sa. tinaku tas…ôpian katuud ku tad…ômaw i r~…ĺar~…ĺabu nu r~…ĺuma Ē~ °,ńßakaj u par~…ĺuajawaj tu a izaw ku mapatajaj i r~…ĺar~…ĺabu nu r~…ĺuma Ē~ °; tas…ôpian jadańß ku nitar~…ĺiŇčan a kasuj,atu pab…ôr~…ĺian nu tau tu tuud,ńßakaj a makaar~…ĺa tu sajkiŇč ¶aaj sa uaa jadańß ku nir~…ĺaŇč…ô ¶,anu mar~…ĺupisak mawaswas ku kasuj,ainajaj ku kar~…ĺisiw atu kakasa Ē~ °timan a tuud.
S.FORM: simpi kapah katinengan a izaw ku mahicaay a kawaw.patatenga'ku tademaw tu simpi,anu ayaw a malitemuh ku canan a mahica i simpi a matineng,anu tasepian ku canan tungusay u paluayaway tu mamalitemuh a kawaw,u simpi ku sakatineng a hicaen atu amahica sa. tinaku tasepian katuud ku tademaw i lalabu nu luma',hakay u paluayaway tu a izaw ku mapatayay i lalabu nu luma'; tasepian yadah ku nitalingan a kasuy,atu pabelian nu tau tu tuud,hakay a makaala tu sayking caay sa uaa yadah ku nilangec,anu malupisak mawaswas ku kasuy,ainayay ku kalisiw atu kakasa'timan a tuud.
S.PHON: simpi kapańß katin…ôŇčan a izaw ku mańßi ¶aaj a kawaw.patat…ôŇča Ē~ °ku tad…ômaw tu simpi,anu ajaw a mar~…ĺit…ômuńß ku ¶anan a mańßi ¶a i simpi a matin…ôŇč,anu tas…ôpian ku ¶anan tuŇčusaj u par~…ĺuajawaj tu mamar~…ĺit…ômuńß a kawaw,u simpi ku sakatin…ôŇč a ńßi ¶a…ôn atu amańßi ¶a sa. tinaku tas…ôpian katuud ku tad…ômaw i r~…ĺar~…ĺabu nu r~…ĺuma Ē~ °,ńßakaj u par~…ĺuajawaj tu a izaw ku mapatajaj i r~…ĺar~…ĺabu nu r~…ĺuma Ē~ °; tas…ôpian jadańß ku nitar~…ĺiŇčan a kasuj,atu pab…ôr~…ĺian nu tau tu tuud,ńßakaj a makaar~…ĺa tu sajkiŇč ¶aaj sa uaa jadańß ku nir~…ĺaŇč…ô ¶,anu mar~…ĺupisak mawaswas ku kasuj,ainajaj ku kar~…ĺisiw atu kakasa Ē~ °timan a tuud.
